title: DBCluster
description: Describes an Amazon Aurora DB cluster

dBClusterIdentifier.description: The user-supplied identifier for the DB cluster

dBClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB cluster

status.description: The current state of the DB cluster

engine.description: The database engine for the DB cluster

engineVersion.description: The version of the database engine

databaseName.description: The name of the initial database

masterUsername.description: The master username for the DB cluster

endpoint.description: The DNS address of the primary instance of the DB cluster

readerEndpoint.description: The reader endpoint for the DB cluster

port.description: The port that the database engine is listening on

dBClusterMembers.description: The list of DB instances that are part of the cluster

dBInstanceIdentifier.description: The instance identifier for the cluster member

isClusterWriter.description: Whether the cluster member is the primary instance

dBClusterParameterGroupStatus.description: The status of the parameter group for this member

availabilityZones.description: The Availability Zones the DB cluster is associated with

backupRetentionPeriod.description: The number of days for which automatic DB snapshots are retained

storageEncrypted.description: Whether the DB cluster is encrypted

multiAZ.description: Whether the DB cluster has instances in multiple AZs

clusterCreateTime.description: The time when the DB cluster was created

allocatedStorage.description: The current allocated storage size in GiB for the cluster

tags.description: Tags assigned to the DB cluster
